---
title: "William Schomberg Robert Kerr, 8th Marquess of Lot"
---

## William Schomberg Robert Kerr, 8th Marquess of Lot

**Dates:** (1832-1870)

### Description

contributor to the <i>Hursley Magazine</i>

### Biography

He was mentioned by CMY in <i>An Old Woman’s Outlook</i> as having been good all his life, he had probably a pupil of Keble’s or Robert Wilson’s, which explains the visit of Wilson to his mother in 1846.

### Letters

- Letter from Whit Monday [19 May] 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
